name: rase-installer
description: Sleek glassmorphism installation wizard for Rase Launcher.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,electron -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:electron
scripts.dist:online: rm -rf bundle && npm run build && electron-builder
scripts.dist:offline: mkdir -p bundle && cp ../dist-package/*.zip bundle/rase-launcher.zip || echo 'Warning: Main App ZIP not found. Building empty offline setup.' && npm run build && electron-builder
